name: Peace
tagline: Digital Peace Process for Global Stability
description: Programs for a Digital Peace Process to end cyber hostilities, cyber disinformation, and autonomous AI weapon systems in conjunction with peace efforts to stop military hostilities for sustainable integral peace.
programs: Digital Peace Initiative bringing together government leaders, technologists, faith leaders, and academia
Planning and advocacy for Cyber Ceasefire
Ending autonomous AI weaponry and cyber disinformation

name: Technology
tagline: Solutions of Digital Sovereignty, Sovereign AI and Values Based AI Programming
description: Solutions for data sovereignty, sovereign AI, and values based programming for the common good of humankind and for serving vulnerable populations worldwide to eliminate the digital divide.
programs: Enabling and providing data sovereign platforms
Sovereign AI and agentic AI with values controlled by users
Goal: fully enabled pod available and within reach of everyone

name: Academia
description: Bringing together academicians and academia from around the world for research and aggregating academic resources on technology for advancement of cyber and AI to benefit humankind.
programs: Developing an academic commons for academicians and academic institutions
Sharing information and collaboration for values based, human-centered cyber and AI technologies

name: Education
tagline: Programs for Cyber Safety, Sovereign AI, and Values Based AI
description: Programs in cybersecurity, cyber safety, and human-centered AI curricula for secular, faith-based, and Catholic schools; students; teachers; parents; and caregivers.
programs: Interactive experiential learning platform and simulations
Cyber safety, cyberbullying, and leadership training
Certification programs for human-centered AI technologies
Curriculum for secular, Catholic, and faith-based schools

name: Mentorship
tagline: Guiding the Next Generation of Values-Based Developers
description: Mentorship and technology programs to guide young and emerging developers and programmers with values based, human-centered principles throughout their innovation journey.
programs: Providing a global mentoring network
Live training and e-learning platforms
Connecting young developers with capital and opportunities

name: Research
description: Supporting and aggregating pioneering scientific research to guide and accelerate human-centric, safe cyber and AI technologies to benefit humanity.
programs: Developing research commons for global collaboration
Connecting researchers with commercial applications
Sharing research and resources through the technology community

name: Regulatory
description: Provide connectivity to all communities with the regulatory agencies to develop effective regulations and standards.
programs: Creating a regulatory commons for global connection
Best practice sharing between regulators
Connecting regulators with technologists, researchers, faith leaders, and academics
Identifying standards for regulatory guidance and human protection

name: Theology/Philosophy
tagline: Interfaith Commons for Values Based Technology
description: Provide an interfaith commons and sharing of values for the continued development and advancement of values based, human-centered cyber and AI technologies bringing faith and science to work closely together.
programs: Creating the interfaith commons
Providing values based integration into developing cyber and AI technologies
Maintaining cultural and societal values in AI programs and systems worldwide
